title: mxr
description: mxr is a local-first email runtime for people who want their inbox to behave more like software than a website. It runs as a background daemon, syncs mail from providers like Gmail and IMAP into a local SQLite database, indexes everything for fast search, and exposes the same core capabilities to the CLI, terminal UI, scripts, and AI agents. The goal is simple: make email fast, programmable, private, and useful even when the browser is closed.
